rows.label: tev061801_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061801_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Pulala about life in NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061801_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061801_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Pulala if anything is troubling her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061801_SEL0031
rows.name:
Ask Pulala about living
alongside the Bias.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061801_SEL0051
rows.name:
Ask Pulala about living
alongside the Larsians.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061801_SEL0071
rows.name:
Ask Pulala about living
alongside other races.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061801_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Pulala about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061801_SEL1031
rows.name:
Ask Pulala about living
alongside the Bias.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061801_MSG0001
rows.name:
Pulala hear that some human friends
want to keep Nopon as pets.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061801_MSG0002
rows.name:
So when Lucia invite Pulala into home,
warning bells definitely start to go off.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061801_MSG0003
rows.name:
But Pulala realize once living
together that Lucia treat
Ma-non and Nopon equally.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061801_MSG0004
rows.name:
Now Pulala is sure that Lucia is good
person. Doubts all seem so silly![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061801_MSG0005
rows.name:
Pulala is looking forward to
making many new friends thanks
to Lucia and nice home.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061801_MSG0010
rows.name:
Lately, no place in Mira is safe for
Nopon. Nopon get attacked everywhere![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061801_MSG0011
rows.name:
But Pulala saw human friends
fighting here and there, so
came to city to get help.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061801_MSG0012
rows.name:
But the paperwork! Mo! Pulala have
to jump through so many hoops to
get quest filed with Quest Board.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061801_MSG0013
rows.name:
Anyway, friend look much less tasty
than Nopon, but friend should still
be careful if wandering outside.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061801_MSG0018
rows.name:
Bias like to eat Nopon,
so Pulala was terrified.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061801_MSG0019
rows.name:
But since living in same city with
Pear Sloth, Pulala realize that
Tree Clan Bias are not so bad.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061801_MSG0020
rows.name:
When Pulala tell Pear Sloth that Bias
out there are still attacking and
eating friends, Prea get worried.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061801_MSG0021
rows.name:
Just as worried as if member of
own family was getting eaten! Then
Prea promise to look into it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061801_MSG0022
rows.name:
Pulala so grateful! It seem Pulala
was one smart cookie to come to city
and make so many wonderful friends.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061801_MSG0027
rows.name:
Comm device of Pulala used to
have "bee-bee- bee-beep" ringtone
for when message come in.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061801_MSG0028
rows.name:
But Gu Ludho so surprised upon hearing
it that Gu Ludho jump right onto roof![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061801_MSG0029
rows.name:
Then Gu Ludho explain that Growth weapons make
same noise when target is locked. ...Needless
to say, Pulala change ringtone immediately.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061801_MSG0030
rows.name:
Then Pulala agree to let Gu Ludho snuggle
Pulala until scary feelings went away.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061801_MSG0031
rows.name:
But Gu Ludho is also pretty
fluffy, so it was like double
snuggle. Lots of static! Bzzzzt![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061801_MSG0036
rows.name:
Pulala and friends threw party to
celebrate victory over Growth![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061801_MSG0037
rows.name:
Grex-tongue pizza that Chanty make
take bit of getting used to...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061801_MSG0038
rows.name:
But everyone have great time talking all night
about food and fashion and places each is from.
Before Pulala know it, sun was coming up![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061801_MSG0039
rows.name:
Hee hee! Pulala cannot thank Lucia
enough for letting Pulala live in
place with so many wonderful friends![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061801_MSG1001
rows.name:
Everyone can rest easy and get on with
life now that Blood-king is gone.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061801_MSG1002
rows.name:
Many thanks to friend! Nopon
that get fried to crisp can now
rest in peace inside tree.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061801_MSG1003
rows.name:
Nopon go to very big tree after
dying. Did friend know this?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061801_MSG1004
rows.name:
Friend say thanks to stuck-up
fancy-pants friend, too![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061801_MSG1009
rows.name:
Bias like to eat Nopon,
so Pulala was terrified.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061801_MSG1010
rows.name:
But living in same city with Pear
Sloth, Pulala realize that Tree
Clan Bias are not so scary.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061801_MSG1011
rows.name:
Once, Pulala tell Pear Sloth that Bias were attacking
and eating friends. Pear Sloth get just as worried
as if member of own family was getting eaten![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061801_MSG1012
rows.name:
It was Pear Sloth that figured
out Blood-king was behind
string of mass devourings.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061801_MSG1013
rows.name:
Pulala was so grateful! Pulala
was smart to come to city and
make so many wonderful friends.[ST:wait ]
